web.description: Hi! Does anyone knows where are personal access tokens located? Previously, this feature was located in the account settings.

web.title: How to get Figma Personal Access Token
web.description: Getting Personal Access Token from Figma · Sign in to your Figma account. · Click `"+ Get personal access token" · Copy the value when present.
